segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: Are you planning to attend the campus tech meetup?

segments.speaker: 题目3
segments.text: How do you spend your Sunday mornings?

segments.speaker: 题目4
segments.text: Still tied up with that group project.

segments.speaker: 题目5
segments.text: What did you think of the new software?

segments.speaker: 题目6
segments.text: I thought the professor said the exam would be cumulative.

segments.speaker: 题目7
segments.text: The museum downtown just opened an exhibit on the history of music.

segments.speaker: 题目8
segments.text: Where does the study group meet?

segments.speaker: 题目9
segments.text: You haven't completed the survey for class yet.

segments.speaker: 题目10
segments.text: The bookstore has a section on self help books.

segments.speaker: 题目11
segments.text: How did you find out about this gallery show?

segments.speaker: 题目12
segments.text: What time does the daycare open?

segments.speaker: 题目1
segments.text: I thought the presentation on ancient glaciers was fascinating.

segments.speaker: 题目3
segments.text: I was sure the professor mentioned an optional assignment.
